name: google-mail-webhook
description: Receive Gmail push notifications via Google Pub/Sub and process incoming email events. Filters by label and event type.

OAUTH_TOKEN_SECRET.description: Secret path for the Gmail OAuth2 token with gmail.readonly scope (e.g. 'google/gmail_oauth_token')

WATCH_LABELS.description: Gmail label IDs to watch for new messages (e.g. ['INBOX', 'UNREAD']). Watches all mail if omitted.

EVENT_TYPES.description: Gmail notification event types to process (e.g. ['messageAdded', 'labelAdded'])

setup_instructions.title: Enable Gmail API and Pub/Sub API
setup_instructions.detail: In Google Cloud Console, enable both the 'Gmail API' and 'Cloud Pub/Sub API' under 'APIs & Services > Library'.

setup_instructions.title: Create OAuth credentials with gmail.readonly scope
setup_instructions.detail: Create OAuth 2.0 credentials and authorize with the 'https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.readonly' scope.

setup_instructions.title: Configure Gmail push notifications
setup_instructions.detail: Call the Gmail API's users.watch endpoint to start receiving push notifications to your Pub/Sub topic, then route those notifications to your Talos webhook endpoint.
